name: the installer help text documents the license-footprint flags and env var
command: out=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/install.sh" help 2>&1); echo "$out" | grep -q -- '--permissive-only' && echo "$out" | grep -q -- '--full-toolchain' && echo "$out" | grep -q 'CTP_TOOLCHAIN_PERMISSIVE_ONLY' && echo help-documented 1>&2
